global_description: A large aquatic bird with a robust body and long wings. Predominantly white plumage with black wingtips. It has a long, flat, orange bill with a large throat pouch. The legs and feet are short and orange.
discriminative_attributes: Long orange bill with throat pouch

part_details.plumage: Mostly white with contrasting black wingtips, smooth and dense feathers.
part_details.bill: Long, flat, and orange with a large, expandable throat pouch.
part_details.wings: Long and wide, primarily white with black tips.
part_details.legs: Short, sturdy, and orange, with webbed feet.

spatial_relations: The long orange bill extends from the front of the head.
The large wings extend laterally from the body.
The short legs are positioned under the body.
